channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Hyperliquid's USDC deal could supercharge HYPE, pressure Circle, Coinbase margins, analysts say
item.description: The revenue share deal could shift an estimated $160 million in revenue from Coinbase and Circle into Hyperliquid's ecosystem, Compass Point analysts said.

item.title: Bitcoin’s trend defining battle starts at the $74K support: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin traders are closely watching the $74,000-$75,000 support zone as exchange inflows rise and market signals weaken following BTC's loss of momentum above $82,000.

item.title: Swan Bitcoin Hit With Nearly $1 Billion Lawsuit Over Prime Trust Collapse
item.description: The lawsuit alleges that the Bitcoin-centric financial services firm took advantage of insider information to escape major losses.

item.title: This Open-Source Phone AI Agent Sees, Hears and Acts—All Without Touching the Cloud
item.description: Oppo's X-OmniClaw runs directly on your Android device, using the camera, screen, and microphone to execute real tasks inside real apps.

item.title: Polymarket Users Spur Insider Trading Suspicions With $2.4 Million in Iran Prediction Wins
item.description: Interlinked Polymarket accounts have made millions betting on U.S. military actions in Iran—and won 98% of the time, analysts say.

item.title: Revolut wants to take Dogecoin mainstream with its new physical payment card
item.description: The European fintech giant is launching a physical debit card that lets users spend the popular meme coin anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted with zero extra exchange fees.

item.title: Price predictions 5/18: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin dropped to the crucial $76,000 support level while large-cap altcoins sold off sharply. Do technical charts suggest that traders will buy the dip?

item.title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
item.description: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.

item.title: Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion AI Lawsuit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman
item.description: The legal battle between Elon Musk and OpenAI has ended in a win for the company he co-founded, following a jury decision.

item.title: Solana is shedding its memecoin reputation as big banks move billions into its ecosystem
item.description: Wall Street and payment giants are quietly taking over Solana, moving billions onto the network for tokenized funds and global payments even as the broader crypto market cools down, according to a new report by Messari.

item.title: Ethereum Founder Vitalik Buterin Says AI Verification Could Help Secure Crypto Networks
item.description: Vitalik Buterin said mathematically verified software may help protect cryptographic infrastructures as AI improves both code generation and vulnerability discovery.

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation is facing a wave of high-profile departures as its internal shakeup deepens
item.description: The turnover comes as the foundation undergoes an internal transition tied to a new organizational mandate aimed at redefining its role within Ethereum.

item.title: Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy receives New York BitLicense for institutional crypto push
item.description: Galaxy Digital became the second company this year to secure a New York BitLicense, following Strike’s approval in March.

item.title: Crypto funds see $1B in outflows as Iran tensions revive risk-off sentiment
item.description: Institutional investors pulled capital from Bitcoin and Ether products as Iran tension and rising inflation rattled markets, while XRP and Solana funds continued to attract fresh inflows.

item.title: Hive Shares Hit Highest Price This Year After Bitcoin Miner Unveils Ontario 'AI Gigafactory'
item.description: Hive Digital Technologies’ stock price popped after the Bitcoin miner unveiled a massive data-center buildout in Ontario, Canada.

item.title: Bank of England, FCA Set Out ‘Shared Vision’ for Tokenization
item.description: The UK’s central bank and financial regulator have launched a joint Call for Input as tokenization moves from “pilots to production.”

item.title: Stripe-backed Tempo taps $7.5 billion DeFi lender Morpho to expand beyond payments
item.description: The move brings onchain yield and lending to the payments-focused chain in a bid to offer full-stack onchain finance platform to companies building on it.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum ETFs Bleed as Crypto Funds Shed $1.07 Billion, Ending 6-Week Win Streak
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs bore the brunt of a geopolitically driven sell-off, CoinShares said, though altcoin funds largely held their ground.

item.title: Ethereum traders say bears ‘in control’ after ETH price drop to $2K
item.description: Ether price fell sharply below $2,100 as increasing sell pressure on Binance and persistent ETF outflows fueled bearish momentum.

item.title: HIVE buys $58 million Toronto plot for AI facility; shares climb
item.description: The bitcoin mining firm continues on its investment path into AI data centers after raising $115 million to expand its global footprint in the industry.

item.title: 'Attractive Opportunity': Tom Lee's BitMine Adds $151 Million in Ethereum Amid Price Dip
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies added $151 million in Ethereum amid last week's price slide, with Tom Lee citing the "attractive opportunity."

item.title: Hyperliquid eyes 55% price rise after Silicon Valley investor's 'massive HYPE buy'
item.description: A bullish long-term chart pattern puts HYPE on track for a potential rally above $70 this year, with a16z-linked accumulation and fresh institutional catalysts strengthening the case.

item.title: Ex-OpenAI's Leopold Aschenbrenner bets big on crypto miners for his $13.6 billion AI play
item.description: Aschenbrenner is shorting Nvidia and AMD in favor of bitcoin miners that own the electricity and data centers needed to fuel the next phase of the AI boom.

item.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
item.description: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.

item.title: Strategy Leverages Preferred Stock Issuance for $2 Billion Bitcoin Buy
item.description: Strategy purchased 24,869 Bitcoin last week for $2 billion, channeling billions of dollars that came from its flagship preferred stock.

item.title: Hyperliquid Defies Market Downturn as SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI IPOs Loom
item.description: Hyperliquid’s HYPE token has jumped as its HIP-3 pre-IPO perp marketplace heats up ahead of a series of high-profile tech IPOs.

item.title: CRYPTO FALLS AS RATE CUT ODDS DROP Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies fell as Fed rate-cut expectations under new chair Kevin Warsh continue to fade. BTC dropped ~2% to $76,660 after briefly hitting $82,000 last week, with analysts flagging $78,00 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1mcnZ2OXIyaVhKTkpyQno2ODFVdmVIYXpaRUpiS2VWODNzREVma1Q1R24wcXpDbzdKMjdSWnp0TlluX3B2Ykl5TW1RT0hGQ2VZTnYwaWd1VkVlTjljQXc?oc=5" target="_blank">CRYPTO FALLS AS RATE CUT ODDS DROP Bitc…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Minnesota Governor signs bill into law that allows banks and credit unions to offer Bitcoin custody services to customers. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5JV3FXQ0FqWFBfZFRYUVl4YVVCNzVwRXNITGwyQTB3bzVPbENIY1NIbFdKRExFenNFdTAwVUFvQ0gtMlpMbXQzRjBTS1JzTnR5Yk02THljUl9wdU1uQjZZVXNLcVJTeXc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Minnesota Gov…

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin gives up all of May's gains, slipping below $77,000
item.description: Strategy made a mammoth $2 billion bitcoin purchase last week, but it's not lifting crypto spirits or prices.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot stock crashes 71% premarket after Chapter 11 filing
item.description: Bitcoin Depot files for Chapter 11 in Texas, plans asset sale and wind-down as regulatory pressure forces shutdown of its Bitcoin ATM network.

item.title: After 7 incredible years, I've decided that Friday May 29th will be my last day at the Ethereum Foundation. I'm humbled by the projects I got to work on along the way: from the KZG ceremony, to helping architect the early design of the Beacon Chain, and a lot in - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE55QWwyeHNIMFZudDh4SXFtc3lxWGFkemxUY1RMMlYtSWRyUWhfNE5ZOHpibVoweXl5S0VNVW1HcDJWWEtpeDZxR1Q4UUxjUEZfOEt0U1g3UUdZMDZLd1E?oc=5" target="_blank">After 7 incredible years, I've decided …

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says AI 'formal verification' could actually make crypto much more secure
item.description: The Ethereum co-founder argued that AI-assisted "formal verification" could become one of the most important tools for cybersecurity in a new blog post.

item.title: Deploi Launches Direct Issuance Infrastructure for Private Credit on Polygon, Secures ISIN Allocations from Nasdaq CSD
item.description: EUR 1 billion note programme planned for 2026 following completion of global issuance infrastructure by the end of Q3 2026.

item.title: Saylor’s Strategy scoops $2B Bitcoin, holdings reach 843,738 BTC
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy bought 24,869 Bitcoin for $2.01 billion last week, lifting holdings to 843,738 BTC as STRC sales funded around 97% of the acquisition.

item.title: Iran Pushes $10B Bitcoin Insurance Plan for Strait of Hormuz: Report
item.description: The platform settles cargo cover in Bitcoin under a plan for marine policies and certificates that could generate $10 billion for Iran.

item.title: Kraken parent Payward's Q1 revenue climbs despite crypto market slump
item.description: Co-CEO Arjun Sethi said the firm kept investing through market weakness, leaning on acquisitions and futures growth to offset softer spot trading.

item.title: XRP slips 2% as profit-taking knocks token back below $1.40
item.description: XRP gave back gains after a high-volume selloff erased the latest breakout attempt, though buyers stepped back in near support around $1.38.

item.title: Standard Chartered to absorb Zodia Custody’s core business, spin out Zodia Solutions
item.description: Standard Chartered will absorb Zodia Custody’s regulated crypto business and spin out Zodia Solutions, as big banks move to own core digital asset custody in-house.

item.title: Hyperliquid was built different. As in, 99% of the blockchain’s revenue is used to buy and burn HYPE. It's a community-first model based on this idea: If the protocol succeeds, the community succeeds. In that spirit, we’re pleased to announce that Bitwise will be - x.com

item.title: 🚨 NEW: Bitcoin Depot, largest US Bitcoin kiosk operator, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE52T0F0VjIyRHhBYWNsbUJWWTlURUNmMFNZbWc0cldQZkNqeEJKdnZEaDV6ZHZQMk5MV3BaUGJTWjBIQmVXUjJiOEVJaTcyOVBWZ3JjYU5KZGJsaUE2QVZmR3d0TVU?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NEW: Bitcoin Depot, largest …

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) drops 13% as all assets decline
item.description: Bittensor (TAO), down 9.6% over the weekend, joined Bitcoin Cash (BCH) as an underperformer.

item.title: Bitcoin faces outsized quantum threat as computing breakthroughs accelerate, Citi says
item.description: The bank said accelerating advances in quantum computing are compressing the timeline for risks to crypto and broader internet infrastructure, with Bitcoin seen as particularly exposed.

item.title: Bitmine buys the dip as Tom Lee ties ether's pullback to rising oil prices
item.description: The Ethereum treasury firm bought over 71,000 ETH last week, a sharp increase from the previous week's purchases.

item.title: Strategy made mammoth $2 billion bitcoin purchase last week
item.description: Michael Saylor and team added 24,869 BTC last week, bringing total holdings to 843,738 coins.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇮🇷 Iran launches Bitcoin-backed insurance service for shipping companies wanting to transit the Strait of Hormuz. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5tWmcyMDQtSXg4TjR5NFpqakZ2MGJITnNhNG80cWZpMXdOY1NRQnV4bFhXQkRRMDZnODdBYXpublJqUzEyT3QyWW1QM3VZdHlxYUNNODdubU9MU1RFQ3pnd1N3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇮🇷 Iran launches Bitcoi…

item.title: South Korea's KB Financial completes stablecoin pilot for offline payments
item.description: The parent company of South Korea’s largest bank completed a stablecoin payment pilot ahead of the country's proposed digital asset framework.

item.title: BREAKING: Iran has launched "Hormuz Safe," a Bitcoin-backed insurance service for shipping companies that want to transit the Strait of Hormuz. Details include: 1. The Iranian government says it could generate more than $10 billion in revenue from the prog - x.com

item.title: IRAN LAUNCHES BITCOIN-BASED SHIPPING INSURANCE FOR HORMUZ Iran has introduced a Bitcoin-settled insurance service for vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz, according to the semi-official Fars News Agency. The “Hormuz Safe” system i - x.com

item.title: Tokenization push could pull trillions of dollars into DeFi, StanChart says
item.description: The bank projects $4 trillion of tokenized assets by 2028, boosting demand for blockchain-native lending and trading infrastructure.

item.title: BREAKING: Michael Saylor's 'Strategy' buys 24,869 Bitcoin worth $2 billion. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1Pdm5IT09FVU96ZkZteGdVRlpHdERHb1I0NXJicWJhWVZiSzVNYTIxY05zREZCZ3NkbV9EbC1Bel8zT1FYbHBXanE2cE9tN0xsOHlWcEhaRGFUR01xNy1WUExB?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Michael Saylor's 'Strate…

item.title: Strategy has acquired 24,869 BTC for ~$2.01 billion at ~$80,985 per bitcoin and has achieved BTC Yield of 12.6% YTD 2026. As of 5/17/2026, we hodl 843,738 $BTC acquired for ~$63.87 billion at ~$75,700 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Slides Back to $77K on Rising Bond Yields, Oil Spike
item.description: Crypto majors are falling and the ETFs are seeing an exodus, while SpaceX had a major debut on Hyperliquid.

item.title: UK’s financial payments network is ready for tokenization, regulators say
item.description: The U.K.’s financial watchdog and central bank unveiled their roadmap for tokenization, the use of stablecoins for institutional settlement and a phased transition toward 24/7 operation.

item.title: Bits to Bricks: Stablecoins and the Evolution of US Banking
item.description: Davis Hart, founder and CEO of Omnia, on the path from 4,500 US banks to 300, what stablecoins really change for American banking, and where banks still win.

item.title: Standard Chartered to acquire remainder of subsidiary Zodia Custody
item.description: The bank's offer to acquire the slice of Zodia Custody it doesn't already own has been accepted by the firm's other shareholders and noteholders.

item.title: Bitcoin falls to $76K after Trump says ‘clock is ticking’ for Iran
item.description: Bitcoin analysis says BTC price could revisit the $65,000 demand area after fresh US-Iran war tensions soured the crypto market mood.

item.title: Bitcoin Slides Under $77K as Crypto Liquidations Top $672M Amid Bond Sell-Off
item.description: Analysts flagged that geopolitical shocks no longer "hit crypto directly" thanks to institutional transmission via ETF flows.

item.title: XRP price may explode to $15 amid 'quiet accumulation,' analyst claims
item.description: XRP still faces short-term downside risk, with a symmetrical triangle breakdown pointing to a possible drop toward $1.00–$1.10.

item.title: The three risks that could overwhelm bitcoin's regulatory tailwind
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 18, 2026

item.title: Proof of Talk returns to the Louvre with 100+ C-Level speakers representing $18 trillion in AUM
item.description: Proof of Talk, widely known as the Davos of Web3, today confirmed its 2026 programme and opened remaining passes for its fourth edition at the Louvre Palace in Paris on June 2–3.
